subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! I swear by the Sun of utterance which hath dawned from the horizon of the All-Merciful's Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین قسم بافتاب بیان که از افق مشیت رحمن اشراق نموده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @thankfulness; gratitude
